title: 🌀 Spectral Dimension
name: Spectral Dimension
what_it_is: A measure of dimensionality based on how waves travel through a structure—applies to fractals, quantum graphs, and spacetime foam.
how_to_use: her body oscillates with spectral dimension—each surface layer hums with higher-dimensional interference
his field distorts space—the spectral dimension spills light in wave-fractal blooms
animation_behavior: Interference patterns pulse across surface, color shifts with frequency, dimensional flicker ---
